industries.name: Food & Beverage
industries.description: Heating, cooling, and thermal control solutions for food and beverage processing, including CIP, pasteurization, bottling, and packaging lines with hygienic designs and washdown-rated equipment.

industries.name: Chemical Processing
industries.description: Thermal components for reactors, storage tanks, and pipelines in chemical plants, engineered for corrosive media and stringent safety standards.

industries.name: Oil & Gas
industries.description: High-reliability heating and sensing solutions for upstream, midstream, and downstream oil and gas applications, including hazardous area designs.

industries.name: Plastics & Rubber
industries.description: Barrel, die, and mold heating solutions for extrusion, injection molding, and rubber processing with precise temperature control.

industries.name: HVAC & Building Services
industries.description: Immersion heaters, heat exchangers, and controls for hydronic heating, air handling units, and building HVAC systems.

product_categories.name: All Products
product_categories.description: Browse the full portfolio of industrial heaters, sensors, controls, and accessories.

product_categories.name: Cartridge Heaters
product_categories.description: High-density cartridge heaters for localized heating in dies, molds, and platens with a wide range of wattages and voltages.

product_categories.name: Plate Heat Exchangers
product_categories.description: Gasketed and brazed plate heat exchangers for compact and efficient heat transfer in industrial processes.

product_categories.name: Temperature Controllers
product_categories.description: Single- and multi-zone temperature controllers with advanced PID algorithms and industrial communication options.

product_categories.name: Temperature Sensors
product_categories.description: Thermocouples, RTDs, and infrared sensors for accurate temperature measurement across a wide range of industrial applications.

product_categories.name: Insulation & Lagging
product_categories.description: Insulation blankets, boards, and lagging materials designed to minimize heat loss and protect personnel.

product_categories.name: Immersion Heaters
product_categories.description: Flange-mounted, screw-plug, and circulation immersion heaters for water, oils, and process fluids.

product_categories.name: Thermocouples
product_categories.description: Standard and custom thermocouples for high-temperature industrial measurement, including mineral-insulated designs.

product_categories.name: RTD Sensors
product_categories.description: Resistance temperature detectors for precise, stable measurements in critical processes.

product_categories.name: Infrared Temperature Sensors
product_categories.description: Non-contact infrared temperature sensors for monitoring moving, inaccessible, or electrically live surfaces.

product_categories.name: Band Heaters
product_categories.description: Mica and ceramic band heaters for barrel and nozzle heating in extrusion and injection molding applications.

product_categories.name: Heating Packages
product_categories.description: Pre-engineered heating skids and packages tailored for industry-specific thermal processes.

products.name: 150W 120V Compact Cartridge Heater, 6mm x 40mm
products.short_description: Compact 150W cartridge heater for small molds and platens, 120V.
products.long_description: General-purpose compact cartridge heater rated 150W at 120V for small molds, platens, and sealing bars. High-density construction for uniform heating and long life.

products.name: 300W 120V Standard Cartridge Heater, 10mm x 60mm
products.short_description: Standard 300W cartridge heater for general industrial heating at 120V.
products.long_description: Versatile 300W, 120V cartridge heater suitable for general industrial applications including dies, molds, and hot plates. High watt density with nickel-chrome resistance wire and magnesium oxide insulation.

products.name: 750W 240V High-Density Cartridge Heater, 12mm x 120mm
products.short_description: High-density 750W cartridge heater for demanding applications, 240V.
products.long_description: High-density 750W cartridge heater rated 240V for demanding applications requiring fast heat-up and tight temperature control. Designed for platens, sealing jaws, and hot runners.

products.name: 500W 230V High-Density Cartridge Heater, 10mm x 100mm
products.short_description: 500W cartridge heater rated 230V for European and international power systems.
products.long_description: High-density 500W cartridge heater rated 230V, optimized for international power standards. Offers uniform sheath temperature and long service life in dies, molds, and platens. Custom lead lengths and terminations available on request.

products.name: 110 kW Gasketed Plate Heat Exchanger, 10 bar
products.short_description: Compact 110 kW gasketed plate heat exchanger rated to 10 bar.
products.long_description: Compact gasketed plate heat exchanger providing approximately 110 kW duty for water-to-water or water-glycol applications. Rated to 10 bar with stainless steel plates and EPDM gaskets for HVAC and light industrial duties.

products.name: 130 kW Gasketed Plate Heat Exchanger, 16 bar High-Temp
products.short_description: High-temperature 130 kW gasketed plate heat exchanger rated to 16 bar.
products.long_description: High-performance gasketed plate heat exchanger delivering approximately 130 kW duty with a 16 bar pressure rating. Designed for higher-temperature industrial processes with NBR high-temp gaskets and reinforced frame.

products.name: 3-Zone 24V DC Temperature Controller with Ethernet
products.short_description: DIN-rail 3-zone temperature controller, 24V DC supply with Ethernet connectivity.
products.long_description: Compact 3-zone PID temperature controller with 24V DC supply, universal inputs, and integrated Ethernet communications for easy integration into PLC and SCADA systems. Supports advanced alarms, autotune, and profile control.

products.name: 3-Zone 230V AC Temperature Controller with Modbus RTU
products.short_description: Panel-mount 3-zone temperature controller, 230V AC with Modbus RTU.
products.long_description: Panel-mounted 3-zone temperature controller with 230V AC supply, dual displays, and Modbus RTU serial communications for integration into legacy control systems.

products.name: Type K General-Purpose Thermocouple, 600°C
products.short_description: Mineral-insulated Type K thermocouple rated to 600°C for general purpose use.
products.long_description: Flexible mineral-insulated Type K thermocouple with stainless steel sheath, rated to 600°C. Suitable for general industrial temperature measurement in pipes, tanks, and ducts.

products.name: PT100 Sanitary RTD Sensor, 450°C
products.short_description: Sanitary PT100 RTD sensor with tri-clamp process connection rated to 450°C.
products.long_description: 3-wire PT100 RTD sensor with sanitary tri-clamp process connection, designed for hygienic applications and rated to 450°C. Ideal for food, beverage, and pharmaceutical processes requiring accurate and stable temperature measurement.

products.name: Compact Infrared Temperature Sensor, 500°C
products.short_description: Non-contact infrared temperature sensor rated to 500°C with 4–20 mA output.
products.long_description: Compact non-contact infrared temperature sensor with 4–20 mA output, rated for target temperatures up to 500°C. Ideal for monitoring moving webs, rotating drums, and electrically live parts.

products.name: Flexible Insulation Blanket, 200–350°C
products.short_description: Removable flexible insulation blanket rated 200–350°C for pipes and valves.
products.long_description: High-temperature flexible insulation blanket with outer silicone-coated fabric and inner needled fiberglass, rated for continuous service from 200°C to 350°C. Designed for removable insulation on pipes, valves, and flanges.

products.name: Rigid Insulation Board, 200–400°C
products.short_description: Rigid calcium silicate insulation board rated 200–400°C.
products.long_description: Rigid calcium silicate insulation board suitable for flat surfaces, ovens, and equipment housings, rated for continuous operation between 200°C and 400°C. Provides excellent thermal resistance and mechanical strength.

products.name: 25 kW Flange-Mounted Immersion Heater for Water, Stainless Steel
products.short_description: Flange-mounted 25 kW immersion heater with stainless steel sheath for water heating.
products.long_description: Industrial flange-mounted immersion heater delivering 25 kW for water and low-conductivity aqueous solutions. Features stainless steel sheath elements, 4" 150# flange, and terminal enclosure for indoor installations.

products.name: Mica Band Heater, 60mm ID, 400°C
products.short_description: Mica insulated band heater for 60mm barrels, rated to 400°C.
products.long_description: Mica insulated barrel band heater with 60mm inner diameter and 30mm width, designed for extrusion and injection molding barrels. Rated for sheath temperatures up to 400°C for continuous operation.

products.name: Food & Beverage CIP Heating Package, 60–120°C
products.short_description: Pre-engineered CIP heating package for 60–120°C food & beverage processes.
products.long_description: Pre-engineered skid-mounted heating package for Clean-In-Place (CIP) and process water in food & beverage plants. Designed for process temperatures between 60°C and 120°C with sanitary construction and integrated controls.

industry_solution_packages.name: Food & Beverage CIP Heating Package, 60–120°C Basic
industry_solution_packages.description: Pre-engineered skid for heating CIP and process water in food & beverage plants. Hygienic design with sanitary connections and integrated temperature control, optimized for 60–120°C duties.

industry_solution_packages.name: Value CIP Heating Package, 60–120°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Cost-optimized CIP and process water heating package for small to mid-size dairies and beverage plants. Includes compact plate heat exchanger, electric heater, and basic PLC control.

industry_solution_packages.name: Pasteurization Heating Package, 80–110°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Skid-mounted heating and control package for milk and juice pasteurization lines operating between 80°C and 110°C with tight temperature uniformity.

industry_solution_packages.name: Compact Hot Water Utility Package, 40–90°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Compact hot water generator package for hose stations, jacket heating, and general utility service in food & beverage plants.

industry_solution_packages.name: Chemical Tank Heating Package, 40–120°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Electric immersion and recirculation heating package for chemical storage tanks requiring controlled temperatures between 40°C and 120°C.

industry_solution_packages.name: High-Temperature Reactor Heating Package, 80–180°C
industry_solution_packages.description: High-temperature heating package for jacketed reactors with integrated controls, suited for batch and semi-batch chemical processing.

industry_solution_packages.name: Pipeline Temperature Maintenance Package, 20–80°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Heat-tracing and control package for oil & gas pipelines to maintain product temperature between 20°C and 80°C in outdoor environments.

industry_solution_packages.name: Extrusion Barrel Heating Package, 150–350°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Integrated barrel heating package with band heaters, sensors, and controllers for extrusion lines operating up to 350°C.

industry_solution_packages.name: Mold & Hot Runner Heating Package, 80–250°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Cartridge heater and controller package for molds and hot runner systems with zones operating between 80°C and 250°C.

industry_solution_packages.name: Electric Boiler Package for Hydronic Systems, 60–90°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Packaged electric boiler system for building hydronic heating loops, designed for supply temperatures between 60°C and 90°C.

industry_solution_packages.name: AHU Preheat Coil Package, 20–60°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Preheat coil and control valve package for air handling units, maintaining hot water supply between 20°C and 60°C.

industry_solution_packages.name: Legacy CIP Heating Package, 60–120°C
industry_solution_packages.description: Earlier-generation CIP heating package retained for spare-part support and reference only.
